response.justification: Bogdan brings genuine breadth across 20 years of engineering and some recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, which is directionally relevant. However, the role is a director-level IC position requiring recognized AI platform expertise, cloud architecture depth, and a track record of advising strategic customers — none of which the resume demonstrates. The AI experience is both very recent and at the tooling/framework layer rather than at the strategic product or platform level the role demands.
strengths: 20+ years of polyglot engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and backend systems
Entrepreneurial track record with GISCollective and a pattern of open-source project ownership
Recent, hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
concerns: No evidence of director-level strategic scope — titles and described work remain at senior/staff individual contributor level
Cloud expertise is superficial (one mention of AWS CDK); no cloud platform architecture or advisory experience
AI involvement is nascent and narrow — MCP tooling since April 2025, no demonstrated AI products at scale or recognized external expertise

key_factors.factor: Insufficient cloud and AI platform depth
Entrepreneurial background and recent AI tooling work
